notes: Case appears in 11th GA 1983 minutes (Recommendation 27) as 'TE Jack Eubanks, et al. vs. Central Carolina Presbytery.' The case was found in order and referred to a judicial commission for adjudication, but no decision opinion text is present in the available pages. The case record shows it was about matters at New Life Presbyterian Church in Central Carolina Presbytery. No final disposition found in these pages.
